description_long: This object is a virtual reality headset, featuring a large, curved front visor that houses the display and optics. The headset is predominantly matte black, with a thick, padded face cushion visible at the rear for comfort during extended use. It has a rigid, adjustable head strap system with side arms and a top band, designed to secure the device firmly on the user's head. Circular side modules likely contain speakers or adjustment mechanisms, and the overall build appears robust and ergonomic. The front of the visor is smooth and unadorned except for a subtle brand marking. The headset is designed for immersive visual and audio experiences, typically used in conjunction with computers or gaming systems.
description: A matte black virtual reality headset with a curved visor, padded face cushion, and adjustable head straps. The design is ergonomic and robust, suitable for immersive digital experiences.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smooth, curved visor and subtle brand marking, with the head strap and side arms visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular side module, the thickness of the visor, and the structure of the head strap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the padded face cushion, the interior of the headset, and the full head strap system.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other circular module and the overall profile of the headset.
